title: hebe diosmoides
intro: Hebe diosmoides, also known as the koromiko, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand that belongs to the hebe family of plants. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties, which help to protect against infections and inflammation. The health benefits of Hebe diosmoides include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Hebe diosmoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
